title: Highlight and automation to detect a duplicate in a given line/column
excerpt:
It would be helpful to have the option to highlight a line when the content of a column is a duplicate of another line for the same column.

posts.author: Leihanne (Leihanne)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be helpful to have the option to highlight a line when the content of a column is a duplicate of another line for the same column.
If highlighting is not possible, just an option to mark in any way (text, status etc…) a duplicate in a given column, and according to criteria.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Leihanne,

You can use the Duplicates and Uniques app for that. Using the app, you can create a template that can run using an integration to automatically identity duplicates in your board.
Here is a demo of how that works.
